---
name: Feature Request
about: 为 dsv4-cc-proxy 提功能建议 / Suggest an idea
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**这个功能请求是否与某个问题相关？**
Is your feature request related to a problem?

**描述你想要的方案 / Describe the solution**

**考虑过的替代方案 / Alternatives considered**

**是否愿意自己实现？**
Would you be willing to contribute this?
- [ ] 是 / Yes
- [ ] 否 / No
- [ ] 需要指导 / Need guidance
